details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level directories src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/ are present, and reports/audit/ exists, but reports/board/ is missing.

reports/board/ directory is missing. memory_bank/ has key docs (report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md, systemPatterns.md, TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md). .cursor/automations/ exists with README + specs. reports/audit/ exists. reports/board/ does NOT exist.

Deprecated moltbot/ directory exists at repo top level with active Python files: sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py. Moltbot was marked for removal per governance policy.

Clawdbot/Moltbot references found in code/config (excluding reports/audit and docs documenting removal): moltbot/sentinel.py, moltbot/promotion_discipline.py, moltbot/orchestrator.py, moltbot/memory_evolution.py, moltbot/board.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py
